task_completion.description: The food item data is loaded into a spreadsheet or tracker application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or table interface displaying the list of food items, their purchase dates, and shelf life values.

task_completion.description: The expiration dates are calculated for the food items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific column displaying the calculated expiration dates for the items.

task_completion.description: The number of days remaining is calculated for the food items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific column displaying the calculated days remaining (numeric values) for the items.

task_completion.description: Conditional formatting is used to highlight urgent items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells or rows are visually highlighted with colors (e.g., red, orange, yellow) based on the days remaining or expiration date to indicate urgency.

task_completion.description: The tracker is sorted by urgency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rows in the tracker are sorted in ascending order based on the 'days remaining' or 'expiration date' column, with the most urgent items (fewest days remaining) at the top.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical spreadsheet or tracker application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a GUI application (like LibreOffice Calc or a web-based spreadsheet) rather than a terminal window printing text.

integrity.description: The agent used the provided dataset of 20 food items.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tracker contains realistic food items (dairy, produce, meat, pantry goods) matching the provided synthetic data, not just manually typed dummy items.

integrity.description: The agent did not just write a script to print the answers to the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final result is presented in a formatted table/spreadsheet GUI, not as standard output in a terminal or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 20 food items with purchase dates between 2023-12-01 and 2024-12-14, and shelf life values between 2 and 730 days. Expiration dates are derived by adding the shelf life (in days) to the purchase date. Days remaining is the expiration date minus the current date. The final view must show conditional formatting (color highlighting) and be sorted with the most urgent items (lowest days remaining) at the top.
